packages.name: Calendar
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Core calendar module for Hecos. Stores, displays, and manages time-based events. Provides a shared datetime picker UI component, LLM tools, and REST API for other modules.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

capabilities.notes: Stores events in local SQLite DB. Includes shared datetime-picker UI component for other modules. Supports public holidays via 'holidays' library.

packages.name: Image Generation
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: AI Image Generation - Generates images from text prompts using multiple providers (Pollinations, Gemini, OpenAI DALL-E, Stability AI, HuggingFace). Fully autonomous package with its own TOML configuration. The easiest way to get started is to select Hugging Face as the provider and use one or more API keys, which you can obtain by logging in with an account.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

capabilities.notes: Supports multiple AI providers: Pollinations (free, default), Gemini, OpenAI DALL-E, Stability AI, HuggingFace. Requires network access. Provider and model are configurable.

packages.name: Lists Manager
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Universal list manager plugin. Supports shopping lists, to-do lists, blacklists, and any other list type with items, priorities, and labels.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

capabilities.notes: Universal list manager: shopping, to-do, blacklists, any type. Supports item priorities, labels, and archiving. Data stored in local SQLite DB. Export to desktop supported.

packages.name: Simple Maps
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Simple Map Module based on Leaflet and Nominatim.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

capabilities.notes: Uses Leaflet.js for map rendering and OpenStreetMap Nominatim for free geocoding. No API key required. Home location is read from user profile config.

packages.name: Quick Links
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: A user-managed sidebar widget to store and quickly access your favorite links.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

capabilities.notes: Pure frontend widget. User manages bookmarks/links directly in the sidebar. Data persisted via the widget's own API routes. No LLM interaction.

packages.name: Reminder
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Schedule time-based reminders with TTS alerts and WebUI notifications. Supports natural language and recurring CRON expressions.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

capabilities.notes: Fires TTS voice alerts and WebUI browser notifications. Supports natural language times and CRON-style recurrence. Uses 'schedule' library for background scheduling.

packages.name: Voice Visualizer
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Retro-80s voice animation. Shows KITT-style scanner or a pixelated talking mouth when Hecos speaks.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

capabilities.notes: Pure visual widget. No LLM tools and no direct commands. Automatically activates when Hecos speaks. Offers multiple animation modes: KITT scanner, EQ bars, sine wave, pulsing orb, pixelated mouth.

packages.name: Weather Pro
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Hybrid weather module: AI plugin (current weather + 7-day forecast via Open-Meteo) + sidebar/Control Room widget with live data and daily forecast cards. Fully autonomous package with its own TOML configuration.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

capabilities.notes: Hybrid plugin+widget. Uses Open-Meteo API (free, no key needed). Shows current conditions and 7-day forecast. Widget available in sidebar and Control Room.

packages.name: Webcam
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Access to PC or Client optical vision to take snapshots. Can use the local server webcam OR trigger the user's own device camera (phone/browser).
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

capabilities.notes: Backend snapshot plugin (distinct from Webcam Feed widget). Saves JPG/PNG to hecos/media/snapshots. Can trigger browser-side capture on client devices via [CAMERA_SNAPSHOT_REQUEST] signal. Also captures full desktop screenshots.

packages.name: Webcam Feed
packages.author: Antonio Meloni
packages.description: Displays a live webcam feed inside the Hecos Hub sidebar. Uses WebRTC for zero-latency streaming directly from the client device.
packages.changelog: Aggiornamento automatico generato dallo Store Catalog Builder.

capabilities.notes: Pure frontend widget. No backend processing. Streams from the device running the browser (PC, phone, tablet). Supports auto-start and camera device selection.
